IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY & DELIVER KEYS, PLTF WILL SIGN STIP PREPARED BY DEFTS TO SET ASIDE JUDGMNT. ANY PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. SEE JUDGMENT.
